<?php /** * This file is part of cocur/slugify. * * (c) Florian Eckerstorfer <florian@eckerstorfer.co> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Cocur\Slugify\RuleProvider; /** * FileRuleProvider * * @package Cocur\Slugify\RuleProvider * @author Florian Eckerstorfer * @copyright 2015 Florian Eckerstorfer */ class FileRuleProvider implements RuleProviderInterface { /** * @var string */ protected string $directoryName; /** * @param string $directoryName */ public function __construct(string $directoryName) { $this->directoryName = $directoryName; } /** * @param string $ruleset * * @return array */ public function getRules(string $ruleset): array { $fileName = $this->directoryName . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $ruleset . '.json'; return json_decode(file_get_contents($fileName), true); } }
